__README__: Copy this file to params.json and edit. This is a flat key->value map that 'make deploy' converts into CloudFormation --parameter-overrides. Only HyperPodClusterName, EmailSender, and EmailRecipients are required. Do NOT set EksClusterName, AgentSpaceName, AssetsBucket, SkillsVersion, or SkillsManifest here — 'make deploy' fills those in automatically. Keys starting with '__' are ignored. Uncomment (remove the '__off_' prefix) any optional key to override its default.
